query:
-- Check all the products we fixed
SELECT planName, monthlyCost, costSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM services
WHERE planName IN (
  'UCXcel Webex Basic',
  'Call Centre Queue with Time of Day Routing',
  'Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex',
  'UCXcel Call Centre Queue',
  'UCXcel Hunt Group',
  'UCXcel Basic Queue Agent',
  'UCXcel Auto-Attendant',
  'UCXcel Voicemail User',
  'DID Australia (1)',
  'DID Australia (10)',
  'DID Australia (100)'
)
  AND status != 'terminated'
  AND billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
GROUP BY planName, monthlyCost, costSource
ORDER BY planName, monthlyCost;
